Priority inversion is the problem that the low priority task hold a resource which is needed by a high priority task. Causing the high priority task can't be executed.
The scenario where busy waiting lead to it is that. Since the high priority task uses CPU more frequently, the low priority task may not release the resource. When the high priority task uses CPU, it always stays in the busy loop and not really doing anything.
Priority inheritance solve this issue by temporary increase the priority of the low priority task to max priority. It let the task could be finished first. Once the task release the resource, the priority of the task is back to the original value.

The priority inversion mens that a process with high priority was waiting for resources which held by a low priority.

Which appears that B get done earlier than A the higher one.
The priority inheritance is that we make C to have highest priority as it have the lock, and return to original after releasing it. We can make sure that the real higher one (A) would not be bothered by this kind of situation.

It make the process has the lock to max priority temporily, and return the process to the original priority after it release the lock. To prevent it wait for others spin lock.

Priority inversion is when a lower-priority process holds a resource that a higher priority process requires to continue execution and the lower-priority process isn't getting CPU time due to its low priority, which makes the higher-priority process spending its CPU time on busy waiting without any useful work done. 
Priority inheritance solves this because the lower-priority process gets the same priority as the higher-priority-process waiting for the resource, thus the lower-priority process will get CPU-time to execute and to release the resource.

Using priority inheritance can prevent lpp be scheduled, and let lpp run, release lock.

Priority inversion happens when a processus of lower priority is preventing a processus of higher priority from executing. 
Process A is executing and enters a critical section, therefore "locking" it. Before A has time to release it, process B, with higher priority than A, starts executing. Since B has a higher priority than A, the processor executes B in priority, but B needs to enter the CS that A is currently occupying. B is therefore going to enter spinlock, waiting to be able to enter the CS, while A cannot execute and release it since B is occupying the processor. 
Priority inheritance is when a process that is currently in a CS becomes of the highest priority between all fo the processes waiting for that CS. The execution and the release of the CS therefore becomes the priorised execution.

A priority inversion occurs when a High priority process A is blocked by a Low priority process B . For instance, A can be in a busy waiting looking for the unlock of a mutex of a critical section owned by B. Priority inheritance lead to solve this issue because, when a process enters in a Critical section then it obtains the maximum priority of all the process which want to enter in the critical section. When the process go out from the critical section, it gets back is original priority.

priority inheritance 會將 high priority 和 low priority process 的 priority 對調，讓 CPU 先執行持有 lock 的 process，等 lock 釋放後就會回復原本的 priority

當低優先序持有鎖，而高優先序的試圖想請求同一個資源而占用CPU，spinlock，低優先序的會沒辦法使用CPU而無法釋放鎖，低優先序的擋住高優先序的行程，這時候就會造成priority inversion。
priority inheritance 是將持有鎖的執行緒的優先權先提高，優先取得CPU，等到釋放鎖之後再降低優先權。

優先權反轉指的是當一個高優先權的程式B在執行spin lock時，CS裡正在運行一個低優先權的process A。由於B的優先權較高，導致低優先權的A沒辦法繼續運行完，並把Lock釋放出來，導致高優先權的B被低優先權的A卡住。而priority inversion則是透過先讓在CS中的A增加優先權，讓A能順利執行完並將lock釋放出來，然後再把它的優先權調回去來解決priority inversion的問題。

when high priority process is waiting for a resource(ex: lock or semaohore), the resource is obtained by low priority processm which is called priority inversion.

If low priority process is working in the critical section, and high priority is asking for the resource but is locked. CPU assign the task to high priority process but not low priority process, which makes low priority process can't execute the task and finish the task. So spinlock happens.

priority inheritance can help. we just need to heighten the highest priority to the executing task, letting it finish the process and release the resource first. Next, let the high priority process get into the critical section to execute. Finally, Lower the priority back to the original one.

高優先權的process由於低優先權的process占用所需的shared data，又低優先權的process遲遲無法完成並release data，使得高優先權的process等待時間過長。
pirority inheritance是令讓低優先權的process暫時取的高優先權，讓其能盡快完成並release data

Priority inversion is the situation where a low-priority process or thread holds a lock to a critical section, and a high-priority task is unable to complete execution as a result. The high-priority task busy waits for the lock to be released, but instead of sleeping, it continuously runs. Since scheduler keeps choosing the high-priority task, the lock is not released. 
Priority inheritance involves increasing the priority of processes that hold a lock in critical section to maximum priority (aging), and only once the lock is released, do the priority levels return to normal. This helps solve priority inversion.

Priority inheritance defines the lower and upper bound time for a process so that the process in the critical section can complete its execution within a bound time, otherwise preempted for other processes to execute.

Priority inheritance give the lower priority process a highest priority for now temporally, so it can execute first and release the lock. After release the lock, it's priority will recover to the original.

The process with higher priority is stuck by waiting the lock hold by the process with lower priority.

When low priority process enter the critical section, and it gets the lock. Now, one process with higher priority enters into the ready queue. The scheduler preempts the lower priority process when it does not leave the critical section. Therefore, when the higher process enters the critical section, it can't get the lock and wait.

Priority inheritance increases the priority of the process holding lock, and prevent it from preemption.

Priority Inversion:
Assume there are two progress, A and B, where A has a lower priority than that of B.
A is in the Critical Section but B occupy resources of CPU but also wait for the permission.
Unfortunately, A can't escape from Critical Section because of the priority of using CPU resources, and B also need to wait for the permission and release the space for A.
Priority Inheritance: 
To solve this dilemma, we can temporary promote the priority of A to the same as B, which helps A to escape. After escaping, restore the priority of A.

priority inversion: higher-priority task is waiting for the resource (ex. lock) , which is currently held by the lower-priority task.

priority inheritance can let the priority of the task that is holding the lock become maximum priority.

priority inversion是指當low priority process手上持有high priority process需要的lock，但CPU scheduler永遠會讓high priority process先執行，導致high priority process一直在空轉(spinlock)，要解決此問題，要使用priority inheritance，讓low priority process的優先度暫時提高到最優先，讓他趕快執行完並把lock release出來

1.當一個low priority process拿到lock時，high priority process開始busy waiting，此時OS會讓high priority process佔有CPU，導致low priority process無法執行無法釋出lock，造成high priority process被low priority process卡住的情況。
2.暫時增加low priority process的priority到最高，執行完釋出lock後再降回原本的priority。

When a low-priority process is holding a lock, it may stop a process with high-priority from executing. A low-priority process A is holding a lock, and a high-priority B is busy waiting. When process A is looping, process B might never execute. 
Priority inheritance increase the priority of the process holding a lock and decrease priority back to original priority. Thus, the processes will keep processing in priority order.
